request.prompt:
Use case: cinematic support footage for the attack quadrant in a narrated CRE strategy video
Primary request: an older but valuable industrial property at sunrise, with vacant loading docks, weathered concrete, and fresh light hitting the facade as conditions finally turn
Scene/background: warehouse district at cold sunrise, thin ground fog, quiet street, opportunity emerging after stress
Subject: aging warehouse, loading docks, gate, facade details, empty lot
Action: the gate rolls open slightly while sunrise light moves across the building and fog drifts
Camera: slow dolly-in, 35mm, confident and measured
Lighting/mood: pale gold sunrise, cool residual shadows, opportunistic but grounded
Color palette: steel, pale gold, charcoal, muted teal, rust
Style/format: filmic, natural grain, high-end real estate mood
Timing/beats: twelve-second forward move with rising optimism
Constraints: no logos, no text, no people, realistic industrial details
Avoid: jitter; dramatic explosions; readable signs; surreal architecture
